title: acranthera simalurensis
intro: Acranthera simalurensis, also known as the Simalur acranthera, is a plant species in the family Gentianaceae. It is a medicinal plant used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Indonesian island of Sumatra, where it has been used to treat various health conditions. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its alkaloids and flavonoids, which have been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. Acranthera simalurensis is traditionally prepared as a decoction or infusion, and has been used to treat health issues such as fever, digestive problems, and skin infections.
